title: Realistic Chests
description: Forget about the boring look of vanilla chests, now you will have more realistic textures!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/REALISTIC_CHESTS/MP_REALISTIC_CHESTS_Header.webp) More than ten years have passed, and the appearance of the chests is still the same... We think it's time for a change. Now, with these textures, you can enjoy a much more realistic and fun look for the chests, we hope you like them! The designer of these textures and models is AviArt. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/REALISTIC_CHESTS/MP_REALISTIC_CHESTS_Description.webp) Over a decade has passed, and Minecraft chests still look the same... It's time for a refresh! With our texture pack, chests get a vibrant, realistic, and fun makeover. Elevate your gameplay with stunning new designs that bring style and immersion to every storage moment. Try it now and enjoy the change! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/REALISTIC_CHESTS/MP_REALISTIC_CHESTS_Faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/REALISTIC_CHESTS/MP_REALISTIC_CHESTS_Screenshots.webp) ![Realistic Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2fAZfFz/images/aaccdbfdd13a6139134b5a6b8972c4a8b9cb2552.jpeg) ![Realistic Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2fAZfFz/images/69910fe9889b57048fab6c5e5591cd31672d0abc.jpeg) .
